hmong.this_ancient_rock_from_the_lunar_highl: Lub pob zeb qub no los ntawm lub Hli highlands muaj 4.4 txhiab plhom xyoo — yuav luag laus npaum li lub Hli ntawd. Nws qhia rau peb tias lub Hli ib zaug muaj global magma ocean.
hmong.dark_volcanic_basalt_filled_the_moon_s: Volcanic basalt tsaus nti tau ntim lub Hli cov impact basins loj kom tsim cov «hiav txwv» tsaus (maria) uas pom tau los ntawm Ntiaj Teb. Cov lava no tawg thaum 3-3.5 txhiab plhom xyoo dhau los.
hmong.a_jumbled_mix_of_rock_fragments_welded: Ib qho kev sib xyaw ntawm cov pob zeb fragments uas welded ua ke los ntawm meteorite impacts. Lub Hli npoo tau raug ntaus ntau dua 4 txhiab plhom xyoo.
hmong.lunar_soil_is_ground_up_rock_from_bill: Lub Hli av yog pob zeb zom los ntawm txhiab plhom xyoo ntawm micrometeorite bombardment. Nws muaj cov me me glass beads thiab txawm tias cov solar wind particles.
hmong.apollo_17_found_orange_soil_tiny_glass: Apollo 17 pom av txiv kab ntxwv — cov me me glass beads los ntawm ib qho ancient volcanic eruption 3.7 txhiab plhom xyoo dhau los. Qhov no yog ib qho ntawm Apollo cov discoveries zoo nkauj tshaj plaws!
hmong.kreep_stands_for_potassium_k_rare_eart: KREEP txhais tau tias Potassium (K), Rare Earth Elements, thiab Phosphorus (P). Cov minerals no concentrated rau hauv cov seem kawg ntawm lunar magma ocean.
hmong.meteorite_impacts_melt_rock_into_glass: Meteorite impacts yaj pob zeb ua glass uas ya hla qhov chaw thiab tsaws ua cov me me spheres. Qee qhov muaj cov gases locked los ntawm ancient lunar atmosphere.
hmong.apollo_15_found_this_4_1_billion_year_: Apollo 15 pom qhov anorthosite 4.1 txhiab plhom xyoo no, ib qho ntawm cov pob zeb laus tshaj plaws uas tau sau. Nws pab ua pov thawj lub magma ocean theory txog kev tsim lub Hli.
hmong.the_moon_is_about_384_400_km_away_ligh: Lub Hli nyob deb li 384,400 km — qhov teeb siv 1.3 vib nas this mus txog qhov ntawd!
hmong.apollo_missions_took_about_3_days_each: Apollo cov hauj lwm siv li 3 hnub txhua sab, taug kev ntawm ~3,900 km/h.
hmong.the_moon_s_gravity_is_1_6_of_earth_s_a: Lub Hli lub gravity yog 1/6 ntawm Ntiaj Teb. Ib tug neeg hnyav 70 kg hnyav tsuas yog ~12 kg qhov ntawd!
hmong.the_sunlit_side_reaches_127_c_while_th: Sab uas lub hnub ci mus txog 127°C, thaum sab tsaus poob mus rau -173°C!

hmong.buzz_aldrin_said_contact_light_first_b: Buzz Aldrin hais «Contact light» ua ntej, tab sis Armstrong cov lus nto moo pib nrog «That's».
hmong.the_first_stage_burned_rp_1_kerosene_w: Theem ib hlawv RP-1 kerosene nrog liquid oxygen — ntau dua 2,000 tons ntawm roj hauv 2.5 feeb!
hmong.sound_needs_a_medium_air_water_to_trav: Lub suab xav tau ib qho medium (cua/dej) txhawm rau taug kev. Lub Hli tsis muaj atmosphere, yog li nws ntsiag to kiag.

hmong.interactive_3d_lunar_surface_eva_use_w: Interactive 3D lunar surface EVA. Siv WASD taug kev, Space dhia hauv one-sixth gravity, F sau rock samples, mouse saib ib puag ncig. Sau geological samples thiab tshawb nrhiav lub Hli npoo ze ntawm Lunar Module.
hmong.the_apollo_lunar_surface_experiments_p: Lub Apollo Lunar Surface Experiments Package (ALSEP) khiav tau ntau xyoo tom qab cov astronauts tawm mus. Lub seismometer pom moonquakes thiab meteorite impacts mus txog 1977.
hmong.the_lunar_roving_vehicle_cost_38_milli: Lub Lunar Roving Vehicle raug nqi 38 plhom duas. Apollo 17 lub rover taug kev 35.7 km — tseem nres rau lub Hli nrog cov yuam sij hauv nws!
hmong.the_flags_on_the_moon_have_been_bleach: Cov chij saum lub Hli tau bleached ua dawb huv los ntawm kev xyoo ntawm unfiltered UV radiation. Tsuas yog Apollo 12 tus chij raug ntaus los ntawm engine exhaust.
hmong.lunar_seismometers_detected_deep_moonq: Lunar seismometers pom deep moonquakes ntawm 700-1100 km tob, tshwm sim los ntawm tidal forces ntawm Ntiaj Teb. Lub Hli tseem muaj ib lub core uas yaj ib feem!
hmong.scientists_bounce_lasers_off_this_mirr: Cov scientists bounce lasers ntawm lub iav no kom ntsuas Earth-Moon distance txog 1 cm accuracy. Lub Hli txav 3.8 cm deb ntawm Ntiaj Teb txhua xyoo.

Lub descent stage ua haujlwm raws li launch pad thiab nyob tom qab. Koj rendezvous thiab docks nrog Columbia, ces pov «Eagle» (uas thaum kawg poob rau lub Hli).
hmong.fire_trans_earth_injection_burn_to_beg: Fire trans-Earth injection burn kom pib 3-hnub kev rov los tsev
hmong.the_service_module_engine_fires_for_th: Lub Service Module engine fire rau trans-Earth injection. Koj coast 3 hnub rov qab mus rau Ntiaj Teb, pov Service Module, thiab npaj Command Module rau re-entry — phase txaus ntshai tshaj plaws ntawm mission.

hmong.watch_the_command_module_survive_re_en: Saib Command Module dim ntawm re-entry ntawm 39,900 km/h los ntawm 2,760°C plasma, deploy parachutes, thiab tsaws rau hauv dej ntawm Pacific Ocean.
